channel.title: Microsoft for Developers
channel.description: Get the latest information, insights, and news from Microsoft.

item.title: 【Extend your coding agent with .NET Skills】使用 .NET 技能扩展您的编码代理
item.description: 【Coding agents are becoming part of everyday development, but quality of responses and usefulness still depends on the best context as input. That context comes in different forms starting from your environment, the code in the workspace, the model training knowledge, previous memory, agent instructions, and of course your own starting prom】编码代理正在成为日常开发的一部分，但响应的质量和有用性仍然取决于作为输入的最佳上下文。该上下文有不同的形式，包括您的环境、工作区中的代码、模型训练知识、以前的记忆、代理指令，当然还有您自己的起始舞会

item.title: 【Announcing the Azure Skills Plugin】宣布推出 Azure 技能插件
item.description: 【Part 1 of the Azure Skills Plugin series Coding agents like GitHub Copilot and Claude Code are great at code, but getting your app to production on Azure is not just about writing co】Azure 技能插件系列第 1 部分 GitHub Copilot 和 Claude Code 等编码代理非常擅长编写代码，但在 Azure 上将应用程序投入生产并不仅仅是编写代码

item.title: 【March 2026 (version 1.111)】2026 年 3 月（版本 1.111）
item.description: 【Learn what's new in Visual Studio Code 1.111 Read the full article】了解 Visual Studio Code 1.111 中的新增功能 阅读全文

item.title: 【Build a real-world example with Microsoft Agent Framework, Microsoft Foundry, MCP and Aspire】使用 Microsoft Agent Framework、Microsoft Foundry、MCP 和 Aspire 构建真实示例
item.description: 【Building AI agents is getting easier. Deploying them as part of a real application, with multiple services, persistent state, and production infrastructure, is where things get complicated. Developers from the .NET community have requested whether a real-world example that shows running on local machine as well as on the cloud in a cloud-nativ】构建人工智能代理变得越来越容易。将它们部署为具有多个服务、持久状态和生产基础设施的真实应用程序的一部分，是事情变得复杂的地方。来自 .NET 社区的开发人员询问是否有一个真实的示例来显示在本地计算机上以及在云原生中的云上运行

item.title: 【Visual Studio Dev Essentials: Free, Practical Tools for Every Developer】Visual Studio Dev Essentials：适合每个开发人员的免费实用工具
item.description: 【When I first found Visual Studio Dev Essentials, it felt like discovering a hidden door in the developer toolkit world. I’d heard about free tools and cloud credits, but I wasn’t sure if it would really matter in day-to-day coding】当我第一次发现 Visual Studio Dev Essentials 时，感觉就像在开发人员工具包世界中发现了一扇隐藏的门。 我听说过免费工具和云积分，但我不确定这在日常编码中是否真的很重要

item.title: 【General Availability: Email and SMS OTP as Second‑Factor MFA for Native Authentication in Entra External ID】全面上市：电子邮件和短信 OTP 作为 Entra 外部 ID 中本机身份验证的第二因素 MFA
item.description: 【Today we’re announcing the general availability of Email and SMS one‑time passcode (OTP) as second‑factor MFA for Native Authentication in Microsoft Entra External ID. This enables developers to add step‑up security to native sign‑in and sign‑up flows while keeping users fully inside their applications. This release focu】今天，我们宣布全面推出电子邮件和短信一次性密码 (OTP)，作为 Microsoft Entra 外部 ID 中本机身份验证的第二因素 MFA。这使得开发人员能够向本机登录和注册流程添加增强的安全性，同时让用户完全留在其应用程序中。本次发布重点

item.title: 【The fine print giveth and the bold print taketh away: The countdown timer】细则给予，粗体则取消：倒计时器
item.description: 【Some time ago, I was purchasing online tickets to an event. When I got to the end of the checkout flow, I got this: Your seats will be held for only a limited time. If you do not complete your transaction in time, your seats will be relea】前段时间，我在网上购买一个活动的门票。当我完成结账流程时，我得到了这样的信息：您的座位将仅在有限的时间内保留。如果您未及时完成交易，您的席位将被释放

item.title: 【Learning to read C++ compiler errors: Ambiguous overloaded operator】学习读取 C++ 编译器错误：不明确的重载运算符
item.description: 【A customer was adding a feature to an old C++ code base, and the most convenient way to consume the feature was to use C++/WinRT. However, once they added C++/WinRT to their project, they ran into compiler errors in parts of their code that hadn't changed in decades. As an added wrinkle, the problem occurred only in 32-bit builds.】客户正在向旧的 C++ 代码库添加一项功能，使用该功能的最便捷方法是使用 C++/WinRT。然而，一旦他们将 C++/WinRT 添加到项目中，他们的部分代码就会遇到编译器错误，而这些代码几十年来都没有改变。另一个问题是，该问题仅出现在 32 位版本中。

item.title: 【Build business understanding with Dataverse in Microsoft 365 Copilot】使用 Microsoft 365 Copilot 中的 Dataverse 建立业务理解
item.description: 【Business applications hold some of the most valuable data in an organization—customer’s financial records, sales pipeline, support cases, inventory orders—but that data has traditionally been locked behind app-specific experiences. Users switch between Dynamics 365, Power Apps, Outlook, and Teams to piece toget】业务应用程序保存着组织中一些最有价值的数据——客户的财务记录、销售渠道、支持案例、库存订单——但这些数据传统上被锁定在特定于应用程序的体验后面。用户在 Dynamics 365、Power Apps、Outlook 和 Teams 之间切换以进行整合

item.title: 【What's new in Microsoft Foundry | February 2026】Microsoft Foundry 的新增功能 | 2026 年 2 月
item.description: 【Editor's note (March 9, 2026): This post was updated to correct Claude model availability (Global Standard deployment in East US 2 and Sweden Central only, preview status) and to clarify the relationship between the /openai/v1/ REST route prefix and the 2.x Foundry SDK package versions】编者注（2026 年 3 月 9 日）：本文已更新，以更正 Claude 模型的可用性（仅限美国东部 2 和瑞典中部的全球标准部署，预览状态），并澄清 /openai/v1/ REST 路由前缀与 2.x Foundry SDK 软件包版本之间的关系
